{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Iteration 216: Limit
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Iteration 216]] is named [[Limit]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
